front.title: Secure Shell Key Exchange Method Using Hybrid Classic McEliece and X25519 with SHA-512: mceliece6688128x25519-sha512

abstract.t:
This document specify a hybrid key exchange method in the Secure Shell (SSH) protocol based on Classic McEliece (mceliece6688128) and X25519 with SHA-512.
About This Document
This note is to be removed before publishing as an RFC.
Status information for this document may be found at https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-josefsson-ssh-mceliece/.
Source for this draft and an issue tracker can be found at https://gitlab.com/jas/ietf-ssh-mceliece.
